languages.text: "Понятия не имею, о чем вы говорите. Единственный космопорт, который принадлежит моему роду, расположен на Кьяве Гамма".
"I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."
languages.original_text: "Понятия не имею, о чем вы говорите. Единственный космопорт, который принадлежит моему роду, расположен на Кьяве Гамма".

traits.locale_text: "I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."
"I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."
"I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."

languages.text: «No tengo ni idea de qué está diciendo. El único espaciopuerto que posee mi casa es el de Kiava Gamma».
languages.original_text: "I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."

traits.locale_text: «No tengo ni idea de qué está diciendo. El único espaciopuerto que posee mi casa es el de Kiava Gamma».

languages.text: “我不知道你在说什么。我们家族名下唯一的星港在基亚瓦伽马星。”
languages.original_text: "I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."

traits.locale_text: “我不知道你在说什么。我们家族名下唯一的星港在基亚瓦伽马星。”

languages.text: « Je ne vois pas de quoi vous voulez parler. Le seul spatioport appartenant à ma maison se trouve sur Kiava Gamma. »
languages.original_text: "I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vois pas de quoi vous voulez parler. Le seul spatioport appartenant à ma maison se trouve sur Kiava Gamma. »

languages.text: "Neden bahsettiğin hakkında hiçbir fikrim yok. Haneme ait tek uzay limanı, Kiava Gama'da bulunuyor."
languages.original_text: "I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."

traits.locale_text: "Neden bahsettiğin hakkında hiçbir fikrim yok. Haneme ait tek uzay limanı, Kiava Gama'da bulunuyor."

languages.text: "Ich habe keine Ahnung, wovon Ihr sprecht. Der einzige Raumhafen meines Hauses befindet sich auf Kiava Gamma."
languages.original_text: "I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe keine Ahnung, wovon Ihr sprecht. Der einzige Raumhafen meines Hauses befindet sich auf Kiava Gamma."

languages.text: 「何を言っているのかさっぱりわかりません。私の家の宇宙港は、キアヴァ・ガンマにあるだけです」
languages.original_text: "I have no idea what you're talking about. The only spaceport belonging to my house is the one located on Kiava Gamma."

traits.locale_text: 「何を言っているのかさっぱりわかりません。私の家の宇宙港は、キアヴァ・ガンマにあるだけです」
